error_generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
hero_sub_1: AI learning app for Japanese schools with many Brazilian students.
hero_sub_2: Zero effort for teachers, maximum understanding for students.
features_sub: AI supports both teachers and students. Learning continues outside the classroom.
feat1_desc: Just enter a topic and level-appropriate homework is created automatically. Multiple choice, fill-in-the-blank, and conversation practice included.
feat2_desc: Students complete homework on their smartphones. Study during factory breaks, commuting — anytime, anywhere.
feat3_desc: Teachers see all students' scores, study time, and submission status at a glance. Instantly spot students who need follow-up.
how_sub: No complex setup required. Start using it today.
step1_desc: Just type an everyday topic in Japanese or English — 'Shopping at the supermarket', 'Greetings at the factory', etc.
step2_desc: Level-appropriate question sets generated in seconds. Review and distribute immediately.
step3_desc: With a Portuguese-friendly UI, students work through homework at their own pace and can ask the AI tutor questions.
pricing_sub: Try it free for 2 months first.
pricing_note: Teachers manage everything. No payment needed from students.
footer_copy: © 2026 にほんごアプリ — Made for Japanese language schools in Aichi Prefecture
